SEARCH
Package com.example.breeze_seas

Class Event

java.lang.Object
com.example.breeze_seas.Event
public class Event extends Object
Event stores the organizer-facing and entrant-facing metadata for a single event document.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Event(String organizerId, int eventCapacity)
    Creates a minimal event instance for temporary or test organizer flows.
    Event(String organizerId, String name, String description, String image, String qrValue, com.google.firebase.Timestamp registrationStartDate, com.google.firebase.Timestamp registrationEndDate, com.google.firebase.Timestamp eventStartDate, com.google.firebase.Timestamp eventEndDate, boolean geolocationEnforced, int eventCapacity, int waitingListCapacity, int drawARound)
    Creates a new event for organizer-side event creation before it is persisted.
    Event(String eventId, String organizerId, String name, String description, String image, String qrValue, com.google.firebase.Timestamp dateCreated, com.google.firebase.Timestamp dateModified, com.google.firebase.Timestamp registrationStartDate, com.google.firebase.Timestamp registrationEndDate, com.google.firebase.Timestamp eventStartDate, com.google.firebase.Timestamp eventEndDate, boolean geolocationEnforced, int eventCapacity, int waitingListCapacity, int drawARound, WaitingList waitingList, PendingList pendingList, AcceptedList acceptedList, DeclinedList declinedList)
    Creates an event using the full field set expected when hydrating from EventDB.

    Returns the maximum waiting-list capacity for the event.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Event

      public Event(String eventId, String organizerId, String name, String description, String image, String qrValue, com.google.firebase.Timestamp dateCreated, com.google.firebase.Timestamp dateModified, com.google.firebase.Timestamp registrationStartDate, com.google.firebase.Timestamp registrationEndDate, com.google.firebase.Timestamp eventStartDate, com.google.firebase.Timestamp eventEndDate, boolean geolocationEnforced, int eventCapacity, int waitingListCapacity, int drawARound, WaitingList waitingList, PendingList pendingList, AcceptedList acceptedList, DeclinedList declinedList)
      Creates an event using the full field set expected when hydrating from EventDB.
      Parameters:
      eventId - Unique event identifier.
      organizerId - Organizer identifier that owns the event.
      name - Display name of the event.
      description - Organizer-provided description.
      image - Poster or image URI string.
      qrValue - QR payload associated with the event.
      dateCreated - Timestamp when the event was created.
      dateModified - Timestamp when the event was last modified.
      registrationStartDate - Registration opening timestamp.
      registrationEndDate - Registration closing timestamp.
      eventStartDate - Event start timestamp.
      eventEndDate - Event end timestamp.
      geolocationEnforced - Whether registration requires geolocation.
      eventCapacity - Maximum accepted entrants.
      waitingListCapacity - Maximum waiting-list entrants.
      drawARound - Current draw round counter.
      waitingList - Waiting-list helper associated with the event.
      pendingList - Pending-list helper associated with the event.
      acceptedList - Accepted-list helper associated with the event.
      declinedList - Declined-list helper associated with the event.

    • Event

      public Event(String organizerId, String name, String description, String image, String qrValue, com.google.firebase.Timestamp registrationStartDate, com.google.firebase.Timestamp registrationEndDate, com.google.firebase.Timestamp eventStartDate, com.google.firebase.Timestamp eventEndDate, boolean geolocationEnforced, int eventCapacity, int waitingListCapacity, int drawARound)
      Creates a new event for organizer-side event creation before it is persisted.
      Parameters:
      organizerId - Organizer identifier that owns the new event.
      name - Display name of the event.
      description - Organizer-provided description.
      image - Poster or image URI string.
      qrValue - QR payload associated with the event.
      registrationStartDate - Registration opening timestamp.
      registrationEndDate - Registration closing timestamp.
      eventStartDate - Event start timestamp.
      eventEndDate - Event end timestamp.
      geolocationEnforced - Whether registration requires geolocation.
      eventCapacity - Maximum accepted entrants.
      waitingListCapacity - Maximum waiting-list entrants.
      drawARound - Current draw round counter.

    • Event

      public Event(String organizerId, int eventCapacity)
      Creates a minimal event instance for temporary or test organizer flows.
      Parameters:
      organizerId - Organizer identifier that owns the event.
      eventCapacity - Maximum accepted entrants.

  • Method Details

    • toMap

      public Map<String,Object> toMap()
      Serializes the current event into the Firestore map shape expected by EventDB.
      Returns:
      Firestore field map for this event.

    • getEventId

      public String getEventId()
      Returns the unique identifier for this event.
      Returns:
      Event identifier.

    • setEventId

      public void setEventId(String eventId)
      Updates the unique identifier for this event.
      Parameters:
      eventId - Event identifier to store.

    • getOrganizerId

      public String getOrganizerId()
      Returns the organizer identifier that owns this event.
      Returns:
      Organizer identifier.

    • setOrganizerId

      public void setOrganizerId(String organizerId)
      Updates the organizer identifier associated with this event.
      Parameters:
      organizerId - Organizer identifier to store.

    • isGeolocationEnforced

      public boolean isGeolocationEnforced()
      Returns whether registration for this event enforces geolocation.
      Returns:
      true if geolocation checks are required.

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the display name of the event.
      Returns:
      Event name.

      public void setName(String name)
      Updates the display name of the event.
      Parameters:
      name - Event name to store.

      public String getDescription()
      Returns the organizer-provided description for this event.
      Returns:
      Event description.

      Updates the description for this event.

      description - Event description to store.

      Returns the poster or image URI associated with the event.

      Updates the poster or image URI associated with the event.

      Returns the timestamp when the event was created.

      Event creation timestamp.

      Updates the event creation timestamp.
      Parameters:
      dateCreated - Creation timestamp to store.

      public com.google.firebase.Timestamp getRegistrationStartDate()
      Returns the timestamp when registration opens.
      Returns:
      Registration opening timestamp.

    • setRegistrationStartDate

      public void setRegistrationStartDate(com.google.firebase.Timestamp registrationStartDate)
      Updates the registration opening timestamp.
      Parameters:
      registrationStartDate - Registration opening timestamp to store.

      public com.google.firebase.Timestamp getRegistrationEndDate()
      Returns the timestamp when registration closes.

      public void setRegistrationEndDate(com.google.firebase.Timestamp registrationEndDate)

      public void setEventEndDate(com.google.firebase.Timestamp eventEndDate)
      Updates the event end timestamp.
      Parameters:
      eventEndDate - Event end timestamp to store.

      Returns the current draw-round counter for this event.

      Returns the accepted-list helper associated with this event.

      Returns the declined-list helper associated with this event.

    • getDateModified

      public com.google.firebase.Timestamp getDateModified()
      Returns the timestamp when the event was last modified.
      Returns:
      Last-modified timestamp.

    • setDateModified

      public void setDateModified(com.google.firebase.Timestamp dateModified)
      Updates the last-modified timestamp.
      Parameters:
      dateModified - Last-modified timestamp to store.

    • getQrValue

      public String getQrValue()
      Returns the QR payload associated with the event.
      Returns:
      QR payload string.

    • setQrValue

      public void setQrValue(String qrValue)
      Updates the QR payload associated with the event.
      Parameters:
      qrValue - QR payload string to store.

    • getWaitingListCapacity

      public int getWaitingListCapacity()
      Returns the maximum waiting-list capacity for the event.
      Returns:
      Waiting-list capacity, or a negative value when effectively unlimited.

    • setWaitingListCapacity

      public void setWaitingListCapacity(int waitingListCapacity)
      Updates the maximum waiting-list capacity for the event.
      Parameters:
      waitingListCapacity - Waiting-list capacity to store.

    • getEventCapacity

      public int getEventCapacity()
      Returns the event-capacity limit for accepted entrants.
      Returns:
      Event-capacity limit.

    • setEventCapacity

      public void setEventCapacity(int eventCapacity)
      Updates the event-capacity limit for accepted entrants.
      Parameters:
      eventCapacity - Event-capacity limit to store.

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Returns the event identifier using the older helper name still referenced in some screens.
      Returns:
      Event document identifier.

    • getDetails

      public String getDetails()
      Returns the event description using the older helper name still referenced in some screens.
      Returns:
      Event description or an empty string if none is set.

    • getPosterUriString

      public String getPosterUriString()
      Returns the poster/image URI using the older helper name still referenced in some screens.
      Returns:
      Poster URI string, or null if none exists.

    • getRegFromMillis

      public long getRegFromMillis()
      Returns the registration-start timestamp as epoch milliseconds.
      Returns:
      Registration start timestamp in milliseconds, or 0L if unavailable.

    • getRegToMillis

      public long getRegToMillis()
      Returns the registration-end timestamp as epoch milliseconds.
      Returns:
      Registration end timestamp in milliseconds, or 0L if unavailable.

    • getWaitingListCap

      public Integer getWaitingListCap()
      Returns the waiting-list capacity using the older nullable helper style.
      Returns:
      Waiting-list capacity, or null if the event is effectively unlimited.

    • isGeoRequired

      public boolean isGeoRequired()
      Returns the geolocation requirement using the older helper name still referenced in some screens.
      Returns:
      true if entrants must satisfy geolocation checks.

    • refreshListsFromDB

      public void refreshListsFromDB()
      Resyncs the list objects with information from the db
